evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); const inp=document.getElementById('searchCatalogo'); if(inp){inp.value='3 ositos avena clasica granel';MOS.filterCatalogo();} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); window.scrollTo(0,0); const wrap=document.querySelector('.pres-wrap'); r.presWrapOpen=wrap?wrap.classList.contains('open'):null; r.presVisibles=document.querySelectorAll('.pres-chip').length; r.presRows=getComputedStyle(wrap||document.body).gridTemplateRows; return r; })()
